DISCOVERY, PLAINTIFF JEFF GRAUMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO, TO DEFENDANT THYSEENKRUPP ELEVATOR CORPORATION AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES GRANTED AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 12-13, 16-17, 21-22, 26-28, 30, 33-41. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT KNOW THE ANSWER TO A QUESTION OR DOES NOT HAVE SUFFICIENT FACTS OR RECOLLECTION TO ANSWER, IT SHOULD CLEARLY SAY SO SPECIFICALLY. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 9-11, 18-19, 29, 32, 42-43 IS DENIED. THESE ARE COMPOUND OR WOULD REQUIRE DEFENDANT TO MAKE A COMPILATION EXPLAINING THE DOCUMENTS WHICH IS SIMPLY NOT PROPER. IF PLAINTIFF HAS SPECIFIC QUESTIONS ABOUT PARTICULAR DOCUMENTS, PLAINTIFF CAN DEPOSE THE PMK FOR DEFENDANTS. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. (302)

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, Set Two, To Deft Thyseenkrupp Elevator Corp. And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF JEFF GRAUMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO, TO DEFENDANT THYSEENKRUPP ELEVATOR CORPORATION AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES GRANTED AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 12-13, 16-17, 21-22, 26-28, 30, 33-41. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT KNOW THE ANSWER TO A QUESTION OR DOES NOT HAVE SUFFICIENT FACTS OR RECOLLECTION TO ANSWER, IT SHOULD CLEARLY SAY SO SPECIFICALLY. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 9-11, 18-19, 29, 32, 42-43 IS DENIED. THESE ARE COMPOUND OR WOULD REQUIRE DEFENDANT TO MAKE A COMPILATION EXPLAINING THE DOCUMENTS WHICH IS SIMPLY NOT PROPER. IF PLAINTIFF HAS SPECIFIC QUESTIONS ABOUT PARTICULAR DOCUMENTS, PLAINTIFF CAN DEPOSE THE PMK FOR DEFENDANTS. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. (Moving party may prepare a proposed form of order.) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
